overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character walking through a flooded medieval village. The scene transitions from a dry stone pathway alongside a cathedral into a misty, waterlogged graveyard with stone crosses, and finally around a small stone chapel. The atmosphere is cold and misty with strong morning sunlight creating dramatic god rays through the bare trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone pathway alongside historic cathedral

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path beside the cathedral wall, approaching the flooded area ahead

notable_agents.action: two villagers sitting on the ground beside the path, one appears to be tending to something
villager walking ahead in the distance toward the flooded graveyard

entered.detail: tall medieval stone church wall with arched windows and weathered wooden doors
wet cobblestone pathway reflecting the morning light alongside the cathedral
weathered wooden fence lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone pathway beside a massive stone cathedral wall. Morning sunlight streams from behind, casting long shadows. Two villagers sit on the ground to the right while another walks ahead toward a misty, flooded area visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded graveyard with ancient stone crosses

events.description: character steps off the dry cobblestone path into the flooded graveyard, water level rising to knee height
movement slows as character wades through the resistance of the flood water

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep flood water among the stone crosses and grave monuments

entered.detail: shallow flood water covering the graveyard ground with ripples and reflections of the sky
ancient weathered stone crosses and grave markers rising from the flood water
small stone chapel with cross-topped roof visible through the morning mist

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide, flooded graveyard as the character steps off the path into knee-deep water. Ancient stone crosses emerge from the reflective surface while mist hangs low over the water. A small stone chapel becomes visible in the distance through the haze.

events.description: approaching the stone chapel building, details of the arched doorway and tiled roof becoming clear
turning right to circle around the chapel perimeter toward the village beyond

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone chapel and circling around its right side toward the distant village buildings

entered.detail: cluster of medieval stone and timber houses with smoking chimneys visible beyond the chapel

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the stone chapel through the flood water, passing close to its weathered stone walls and arched doorway. Circling around the building, the view opens toward a distant medieval village with timber-framed houses. The water remains deep as the character navigates around the chapel's perimeter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dry, sunlit cathedral path into a misty, waterlogged graveyard and village. It begins with the character walking along a narrow cobblestone pathway beside a massive stone wall, where morning sunlight casts long shadows over resting villagers. As the character steps off the path, the scene opens into a wide, flooded graveyard where ancient stone crosses emerge from a reflective, knee-deep surface under a low-hanging haze. The camera then follows the character through the water toward a weathered stone chapel, passing its arched doorway before circling the building's perimeter. Finally, the view expands beyond the chapel to reveal a distant medieval village of timber-framed houses stretching across the flooded landscape.
